failures.description: The agent fabricated the cheapest item and price instead of using the actual cheapest item from the ProductCatalogSearch output.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The correct tool call was made and returned 11 available kettles sorted by ascending price. The first item in the tool output was item_id 1240311797 priced at 137.17, so all required information was available before synthesis. At index 4, the agent produced an answer claiming Item 0000000000 costs $0.01. That item_id and price are absent from the tool result and all prior context, and the agent relied on this invented information as the final answer.
